product_results.title: Nike Men's Air Max 270, BLACK/WHITE, 12 M US

summary.text: The shoes are comfortable to wear. However, customers report issues with durability, noting that the sides tear apart and the tread wears down over time.

authors_reviews.title: best shoes out there.
authors_reviews.text: love these kicks, like walking on air.
authors_reviews.author: rick giovannini
